name: schema-registry-dag-schema-validation-service
description: T205 SchemaValidationService — VALIDATION archetype. Validates documents against their PINNED schemaVersion (from document.schemaVersion field). NEVER validates against current/latest schema version.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: reads document.schemaVersion field, validates against pinned version only, NEVER uses current schema, returns ValidationResult
Retrieve VALIDATION arch pattern + pinned-version-validation + schema-version-pin + document-validation patterns for T205

Break T205 into: receive document → read document.schemaVersion field → fail if schemaVersion absent → load pinned schema by schemaId+version → validate document fields against pinned schema → return ValidationResult

Generate schema-validation-service.service.ts — validates incoming documents by reading document.schemaVersion field (required), loads the PINNED schema at that exact version from DATABASE, validates document fields. MISSING_SCHEMA_VERSION error if field absent. NEVER resolves to latest or current schema version. Returns ValidationResult with field-level errors.
Named check validation: reads_document_schema_version_field, rejects_missing_schema_version, loads_pinned_schema_version, never_loads_latest, field_level_validation_errors
Score generated code 0-100 against T205 iron rules: pinned version from document field, no latest resolution, field-level errors, missing version rejection
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=reads-document-schemaVersion+loads-pinned+field-level-errors, rejected=resolves-to-latest-schema OR validates-without-version-field OR no-missing-version-error. curriculumTier=2.
